verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Amidst the hustling clamoring world Sometimes it's hard to hear The voice of God speaking to my soul But in my quiet time alone When I approach His holy throne His tender words fall gently on my ear

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He still speaks. I know His voice Sweeter sound never heard by mortal ears. And to think that God by His own choice Would speak to me it makes me rejoice. He still speaks. I know his voice

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There are so many who still doubt that God can speak today They laugh and mock When we say we've heard from God. Yet, that still small voice of God is heard Above the doubters of this world His timeless words ring out with hope today.
